zh.lifeSummary: 當John Appleton於1350年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德時，他的父親William Appleton27歲，母親Appleton22歲。他於1380年之前與Appleton在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1416年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 瓦爾迪費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Appleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England named Appleton, from Old English æppeltūn ‘orchard’ (literally ‘apple enclosure’). Apples were particularly important in the Middle Ages as a food for survival through the winter.
History: This surname was brought to North America in 1635 by Samuel Appleton, who migrated from Ipswich, England, to Ipswich, MA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Appleton was born in 1350, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Appleton, was 27 and his mother, Appleton, was 22. He married Appleton before 1380, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1416, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Appleton est né en 1350, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Appleton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Appleton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Appleton avant 1380, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1416, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Appleton 1350 in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Appleton 27 und seine Mutter Appleton 22. Er hat vor 1380 in England Appleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1416 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Appleton è nato il nel 1350 nel Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Appleton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Appleton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Appleton prima del 1380, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1416, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Appletonが1350年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで生まれた時，父William Appletonは27歳，母Appletonは22歳であった。1380年以前にイギリスでAppletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1416年に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクグレアト ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Appleton(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Appleton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Appleton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1380년 이전 영국에서 Appleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1416년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그리트 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Appleton nasceu em 1350, em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Appleton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Appleton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Appleton antes 1380, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1416, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Appleton родился в 1350 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Appleton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Appleton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Appleton перед 1380 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1416 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности грит валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Appleton nació en 1350, en Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Appleton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Appleton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Appleton antes de 1380, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1416, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Great Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
